title: GoedeKoffie's Optimization Pack
description:
A modpack all about optimizing.
Made by GoedeKoffie
body:
This is a modpack all about optimization.
---
With tons of optimizing mods you'll have lots of FPS.

Made for any launcher that supports modrinth filetype.

---

DISCLAIMER: I have not made any mod provided in this pack. All credit should go to the respective mod makers

---

Credits/Mod list:
- Enhanced Block Entities
- EntityCulling
- Exordium
- FastAnim
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Indium
- Lithium
- Memory Leak Fix
- More Culling
- Nvidium
- Sodium
